'''''Delphine''''' was a [[cargo ferry]] used by [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. ''Delphine'' aided other Dimok [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in raiding a [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] supply convoy in the beginning of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sepan campaign]]. Intending to drive off the Dimok raiders, Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE starfighters]] destroyed the Cargo Ferry ''[[Mangonel]]'', among numerous [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], forcing ''Delphine'' to retreat to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
